scripts.setup: pnpm --dir client install && cd agent && uv sync
scripts.dev:agent:pipeline: cd agent && AGENT_WORKER_MODE=pipeline uv run python main.py dev
scripts.dev:agent:realtime: cd agent && AGENT_WORKER_MODE=realtime AGENT_STANCE=dominant uv run python main.py dev
scripts.dev:agent:realtime:passive: cd agent && AGENT_WORKER_MODE=realtime AGENT_STANCE=passive uv run python main.py dev
